content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (`LoginView.swift:9` SecureField) but review credentials are placeholders (`demo_user.txt` "test", `demo_password.txt` "changeme") and notes say only "TBD" (`notes.txt:1`).
Pierre: Apple reviewers must be able to sign in and exercise every gated feature, so placeholder credentials and empty notes typically trigger a 2.1 rejection or an information request. Replace "test"/"changeme" with a real working demo account and write step-by-step notes explaining how to reach core features (e.g. any paywall or account-only screens). Verify the account stays active through the review window.
